description: One node type: tasks/<id>.md markdown + YAML frontmatter (title/created/updated/claimant/parent/priority/blockers/tags). NO status field — derived status ladder (claimed/blocked/ready). id_scheme {prefix,length,alphabet}, random generator, string-safety validation, id = filename basename (Model A). Parse/serialize + unknown-key preservation.
title: §3 task schema + § id generation
